_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Troubleshooting and problem resolution involves using lateral thinking to break a problem down into its component parts to identify and diagnose root causes; troubleshoot and identify problems across different technology capabilities including computing, storage, networking, physical infrastructure, software, commercial-off-the-shelf software (COTS) and open source software.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to diagnose and resolve technical issues that span multiple system layers, tracing problems across application code, data pipelines, databases, networks, and infrastructure to identify and remediate root causes.
comments: DDaT skill superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-S-012 (TF, cosine: 0.556), DQ-S-001 (DQ, cosine: 0.465).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 7.1/10 (raw 0.713). Shared vocabulary: [across, causes, diagnose, identify, infrastructure, problems, root]. DDaT-only terms [break, capabilities, commercial, component, computing, cots] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, application, code, data, databases, issues] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.875 (P=0.851, R=0.899). R exceeds P by 0.048 — the WIDAI KSA's 29 words are well-captured by the DDaT element's 45 words, but the DDaT element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: entailment-dominant (99.7%). The model interprets "Troubleshooting and problem resolution involves using lateral thinking to break" as logically implying aspects of "Ability to diagnose and resolve technical issues that span multiple system layer" — directional semantic containment consistent with 'Superset of' classification.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.649 < STS 0.713 (gap -0.064). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [break, capabilities, commercial] and [ability, application, code] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 15.8%. Shared tokens: [across, causes, diagnose, identify, infrastructure, problems, root]. DDaT-only: [break, capabilities, commercial, component, computing, cots]. WIDAI-only: [ability, application, code, data, databases, issues].
